from pathlib import Path

Bash(python -c "
from pathlib import Path
SCRIPT_DIR = Path\('C:/code/ifhub/tools'\).resolve\(\)
IFHUB_ROOT = SCRIPT_DIR.parent
projects = IFHUB_ROOT / 'projects'
print\('IFHUB_ROOT:', IFHUB_ROOT\)
print\('projects:', projects, '| exists:', projects.exists\(\)\)
for e in sorted\(projects.iterdir\(\)\):
    if e.is_dir\(\) and not e.name.startswith\('.'\):
        print\(f'  /{e.name} -> {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
